query:
SELECT external_id, contract_external_id, receipt_no, paid_at, amount, period_no, sub_no, status
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE contract_external_id = 'CT0225-LRI001-9357-01'
ORDER BY paid_at, receipt_no;
